task_completion.description: Set the custom Hounsfield Unit (HU) threshold range for air spaces.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the InVesalius threshold or segmentation panel, the custom threshold values should be explicitly set to a minimum of -1024 and a maximum of -200.

task_completion.description: Create a segmentation mask based on the custom threshold.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A new mask should be visible in the mask list/panel, or the 2D slice viewers should show a colored overlay highlighting the air spaces and paranasal sinuses.

task_completion.description: Generate a 3D surface from the segmentation mask.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 3D viewer pane in InVesalius should display a generated 3D model representing the complex, organic shapes of the paranasal sinuses and cranial air spaces.

task_completion.description: Export the 3D surface as an STL file to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An 'Export 3D surface' dialog showing the file being saved as 'air_spaces.stl' in the '/home/ga/Documents/' directory, or a file manager/terminal window confirming the file exists at this exact path.

task_completion.description: Save the InVesalius project to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save Project' dialog showing the file being saved as 'air_project.inv3' in the '/home/ga/Documents/' directory, or a file manager/terminal window confirming the file exists at this exact path.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the InVesalius 3 GUI to perform the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show active interaction with the InVesalius 3 interface (clicking menus, adjusting sliders, viewing 3D models), rather than just running a pre-written script in a terminal.

integrity.description: Verify the 3D surface is a genuine medical reconstruction and not a dummy file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 3D viewer should display an anatomical structure (sinuses/air spaces) that matches the thresholded mask, not an empty viewer, a generic primitive shape, or an error screen.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the exact requested file paths.
integrity.visual_evidence: The save/export dialogs or terminal outputs must show the exact filenames 'air_spaces.stl' and 'air_project.inv3' in the '/home/ga/Documents/' directory, without typos or alternative locations.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target Hounsfield Unit (HU) threshold range must be exactly -1024 (min) to -200 (max). The 3D surface must be exported as an STL file to '/home/ga/Documents/air_spaces.stl'. The InVesalius project must be saved to '/home/ga/Documents/air_project.inv3'. The resulting 3D surface should visually represent the paranasal sinuses and air spaces, which appear as complex, organic internal cavities.
